task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Stripe Webhook Handler** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: webhook_handler. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no login/signup scaffold), one POST endpoint on a /webhook/* path, saves incoming payload to an Events table, returns { received: true }. DO NOT build auth, pages, or CRUD endpoints — this is a single-purpose receiver, not an app. Path: POST /webhook/stripe. Incoming body: { type, amount, customer_email, signature }.
